meaning: n.[希神]阿芙罗狄蒂(爱与美的女神)
examples: He picked Aphrodite, thus angering Athena and Hera.
No one knows who created the statue of the Aphrodite of Melos.
One day, she finally took up her courage and asked Aphrodite: "can I be loved?"
Mr Ferri saw a photograph of Aphrodite, and decided that it belonged back in Italy.
Travel down the peninsula from the city of Marmaris to the seaside theatre at Knidos, where Aphrodite was worshipped.
